scripts.package: npm run prepare:backend-runtime && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --publish never && npm run verify:packaged-backend
scripts.package:release: npm run prepare:backend-runtime && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --publish never && npm run verify:packaged-backend
scripts.package:prepackaged: npm run verify:packaged-backend && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --publish never --prepackaged release/win-unpacked
scripts.package:dir: npm run prepare:backend-runtime && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.json --win dir --publish never && npm run verify:packaged-backend
